item.title: Very Important Bonus Content (Season 2)
item.description:
Here are all the moments left on the cutting room floor from season 2 of Very Important People.

Duration: 34:39

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises
